'''Quesna Base''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cargo Facility 2|cargo facility]] and prison base.

Quesna Based often ordered [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] from [[Bebel Gas]] and [[ion coolant]] from [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. The station's defenses ranged from [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] to the occasional [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wings]] bringing in convoys containing equipment and from a couple of [[Large Gun Emplacement]]s to the [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] [[Hammer (IPV-1 System Patrol Craft)|''Hammer'']].

==History==
Quesna Base was where [[Emon Azzameen]] was imprisoned after he was arrested for "crimes against the Empire." When [[Aeron Azzameen]] discovered Emon was arrested, [[Dunari]] hired some [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] to discover his location. He then formulated a plan to rescue Emon with the help of [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]. Dunari rigged a container of Tibanna gas to blow when brought into the station.

When the two picked up the container from the [[Stockyard]] base and brought it to Quesna Base under the guise of an [[Ocanis Gas]] delivery, they placed it close to the station so that one of its tugs would pick it up; the container then exploded in the hangar as planned. In the ensuing chaos, Ace,in the [[YT-2000 light freighter/Legends|YT-2000]] ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'', provided cover for Dunari, who was in the [[Muurian transport]] ''[[Deadman's Hand]]''.

When Emon was rescued, both ships escaped into hyperspace and arrived back at [[Dunari's Rest]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
